zh.lifeSummary: Robert Brooke於大約1495年出生在英國倫敦。他於大約1521年與Mrs. Katheryn Brooke在英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 貝尼特 格拉其 煙雨 聖 倫納德 易亞斯亞普結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他在英國倫敦被列為merchant tailor of london。他去世於1551年6月在英國英格蘭倫敦享年57歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 貝尼特 格拉其 煙雨 聖 倫納德 易亞斯亞普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Robert Brooke于大约1495年出生在英国倫敦。他于大约1521年与Mrs. Katheryn Brooke在英国米德萊可倫敦 聖 貝尼特 格拉其 煙雨 聖 倫納德 易亞斯亞普结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他在英国倫敦被列为merchant tailor of london。他去世于1551年6月在英国英格兰倫敦享年57岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可倫敦 聖 貝尼特 格拉其 煙雨 聖 倫納德 易亞斯亞普。

nameMeanings.name: Brooke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Brook  , which preserves a trace of the Old English dative singular case, originally used after a preposition (e.g. ‘at the brook’).

History: In 1650, Robert and Mary Mainwaring Brooke brought ten children and a number of servants with them from England to MD, where Robert became governor. Although the fourteen known contemporary Brooke immigrants in VA included Robert's brothers Richard and Humphrey, the relationships of the others are unknown. Brooke family memorials remain in the Anglican church at Whitchurch, Hampshire, England.

variants.name: Brook
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived by a brook, stream, water-meadows or low, marshy ground, from Middle English brook, Old English brōc ‘brook, stream’; or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word, such as Brook (Kent, Rutland) or Brooke (Norfolk).
North German: topographic name for someone who lived by a water meadow or marsh, from Low German brook (cognate with German Bruch ‘swamp’ and Old English brōc; see 1 above).
Americanized form of Dutch Broek: topographic name from broek, a cognate of 2 above.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: Robert Brooke was born about 1495, in London, England. He married Mrs. Katheryn Brooke about 1521, in London St Benet Gracechurch with St Leonard Eastcheap, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. His occupation is listed as merchant tailor of london in London, England. He died in June 1551, in London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 57, and was buried in London St Benet Gracechurch with St Leonard Eastcheap, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Robert Brooke est né environ 1495, à Londres, Angleterre. Il a épousé Mrs. Katheryn Brooke environ 1521, à London St Benet Gracechurch with St Leonard Eastcheap, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est merchant tailor of london à Londres, Angleterre. Il est décédé en juin 1551, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à London St Benet Gracechurch with St Leonard Eastcheap, Middlesex, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Brookeは約1495年にイギリスロンドンで生まれた。約1521年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドン スト ベンエット グレイセチャーチ ウィス スト レオナルド エアストチェアップでMrs. Katheryn Brookeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。イギリスロンドンでの職業はmerchant tailor of londonと記録されている。彼は1551年6月にイギリスイギリスロンドンで57歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスロンドン スト ベンエット グレイセチャーチ ウィス スト レオナルド エアストチェアップにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Brooke(은)는 대략 1495년 영국 런던에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1521년 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 베넷 그라스c후르치 위스 스트 리나르드 이스트체아프에서 Mrs. Katheryn Brooke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 런던에서 merchant tailor of london이었다. 그는 1551년 6월 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 베넷 그라스c후르치 위스 스트 리나르드 이스트체아프에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Mrs. Katheryn Brooke aproximadamente 1521, em London St Benet Gracechurch with St Leonard Eastcheap, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como merchant tailor of london em London, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em junho de 1551, em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em London St Benet Gracechurch with St Leonard Eastcheap, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Robert Brooke родился около 1495 г. в местности Лондон, Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Katheryn Brooke около 1521 г. в местности лондон ст бинет греисечурч вит ст леонард эасчип, миддлесекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери.  Он работал по профессии merchant tailor of london в местности Лондон, Англия. Он умер июнь 1551 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности лондон ст бинет греисечурч вит ст леонард эасчип, миддлесекс, Англия.

Su ocupación registrada era merchant tailor of london en London, Inglaterra. Murió en junio de 1551, en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en London St Benet Gracechurch with St Leonard Eastcheap, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
